zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Featherstone於1428年出生在英國達勒姆斯坦普時，她的父親Sir Thomas Featherstone18歲，母親ALISON WHITFIELD15歲。她和Thomas Forster II至少有2個兒子。她去世於1512年在英國諾圖波藍德卡素享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德班包。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Featherstone于1428年出生在英国達勒姆斯坦普时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Featherstone18岁，母亲ALISON WHITFIELD15岁。她和Thomas Forster II至少有2个儿子。她去世于1512年在英国諾圖波藍德卡素享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德班包。

nameMeanings.name: Featherstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Staffordshire, Yorkshire, and Northumberland, which are so called from Old English fetherstān ‘tetralith’, a prehistoric structure consisting of three upright stones capped with a headstone (from Old English fe(o)ther- ‘four’ + stān ‘stone’).

variants.name: Featherson
meanings: English: variant of Featherstone with loss of -t-.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Featherstone was born in 1428, in Stanhope, Durham, England, her father, Sir Thomas Featherstone, was 18 and her mother, ALISON WHITFIELD, was 15. She had at least 2 sons with Thomas Forster II. She died in 1512, in Castle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Featherstone est née en 1428, à Stanhope, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Featherstone, avait 18 ans et sa mère, ALISON WHITFIELD, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Thomas Forster II. Elle est décédée en 1512, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Bamburgh, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Featherstone 1428 in Stanhope, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Featherstone 18 und ihre Mutter ALISON WHITFIELD 15. Sie hatte mit Thomas Forster II mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1512 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Castle, Northumberland, England und wurde in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Featherstone è nata il nel 1428 nel Stanhope, Durham, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Featherstone, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, ALISON WHITFIELD, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Thomas Forster II. Morì nel 1512, nel Castle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Featherstoneが1428年にイギリスダルハムスタンhオペで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Featherstoneは18歳，母ALISON WHITFIELDは15歳であった。彼女はThomas Forster IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1512年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Featherstone(이)가 1428년 영국 뒤람 스탠홉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Featherstone(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 ALISON WHITFIELD(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Forster II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 바버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Featherstone nasceu em 1428, em Stanhope, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Featherstone, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, ALISON WHITFIELD, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Thomas Forster II. Ela faleceu em 1512, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Featherstone родилась в 1428 г. в местности станоп, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Featherstone было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали ALISON WHITFIELD, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Thomas Forster II. Она умерла в 1512 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности бамбург, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Featherstone nació en 1428, en Stanhope, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Featherstone, tenía 18 años y su mamá, ALISON WHITFIELD, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Thomas Forster II. Murió en 1512, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
